profile.name: Aurelian Forgekeeper
profile.description: Operates a forge-themed identity vault where each secure action compounds reputation, chain pressure, and collectible outputs.

forge.comboHint: No active chain. Fire an action to start.
forge.artifactHint: Artifacts capture proof of momentum, not just files at rest.
forge.doctrine: Storage becomes craft when every action compounds.
forge.motto: Temper signal. Preserve proof. Leave a mark.
forge.signatureDescription: A forge-native progression loop: secure actions raise heat, sustained rhythm extends combo chains, and milestone runs mint artifacts that define operator identity.
forge.seasonDescription: Limited-window forge trials designed to reward consistency, velocity, and precision rather than raw volume.

credentials.title: Forgewright Pass

credentials.title: Heatkeeper Badge
credentials.description: Scopes access for high-pressure runtime checks and vault recovery drills.

credentials.title: Starfire Contributor Tag
credentials.description: Marks operators trusted to shape seasonal rules and forge doctrine.

vaultRecords.title: Runbook: Ember Deploy
vaultRecords.description: Operational note for orchestrating secure releases without snapping combo momentum.

vaultRecords.title: Cold Reset Ritual
vaultRecords.description: Protected recovery procedure for re-linking trusted identities after a hard cooldown.
